view.title: Sector Claim {hostname}
view.name: Officer Name:
view.noDomainLogFound: No sector claim log entries found.
view.allGoodNoErrors: All systems nominal! No anomalies detected in contact coordinates!
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: Are you sure you want to retransmit the welcome subspace message?
view.welcomeEmailResent: The welcome subspace transmission has been resent. Check your comm channel.

order.findDomain: Scan for your sector claim designation and verify availability.
order.premiumAvailable: Affirmative! Your sector claim {domain} is available and is a premium designation. Automatic registration is disabled. Transmit to {email} if you wish to acquire this sector claim for {cost} per standard year.
order.premiumTaken: Negative! Your sector claim {domain} is already claimed! You already hold it? You can execute a transfer, and it is a premium designation. Automatic registration is disabled. Transmit to {email} if you wish to acquire this sector claim for {cost} per standard year.
order.available: Affirmative! Your sector claim {domain} is available! You can register it for {cost}. Renewal credit cost will be {renewal}.
order.taken: Negative! Your sector claim {domain} is already claimed! You already hold it? You can execute a transfer for {cost}. Renewal credit cost will be {renewal}.
order.whoisPrivacyLabel: Registry Privacy Shield for {cost} / standard year
order.whatIsWhoisPrivacy: What is the Registry Privacy Shield?
order.subscriptionAutoRenew: The subscription will automatically renew after every standard year at {cost} until decommissioned.
order.subscriptionDisclaimer: By confirming this box, you acknowledge that you are acquiring a subscription service that automatically renews (As Per The Terms Outlined Above) and is charged to the Credit Chip you provide today. If you wish to cancel your auto-renewal, you may access the fleet portal (Here) select the active service and activate the Abort link or transmit to: billing{'@'}interserver.net or use another method outlined in the Federation Terms and Conditions. By confirming the box and activating Place My Requisition below, you also acknowledge you have read, understand, and agree to our Federation Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy.
order.agreeCheckbox: I have reviewed the terms above and I agree.
order.searchingDomain: Processing... standby, Officer... Scanning for this sector claim designation.
order.loadingDomainFields: Processing... standby, Officer... Loading sector claim parameters.

nameservers.title: Sector Claim Navigation Relay Servers
nameservers.suggestedApplied: Recommended navigation relays have been applied. Activate Update to commit to ship's log.
nameservers.deleteConfirm: You are about to purge your sector claim navigation relay.

eppCode.title: Transmit EPP Code
eppCode.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to transmit the EPP Code to the registered subspace comm address?

whois.title: Registry Privacy Shield
whois.renewalNote: Registry Privacy Shield renews every 12 standard months from the activation stardate. Registry Privacy Shield addon renewal credit cost is {cost}.
whois.notAvailable: Registry Privacy Shield is not available for this sector extension (TLD).
whois.currentlyEnabled: Registry Privacy Shield is currently engaged for {hostname}.
whois.disableAndCancel: Disengage and Decommission Registry Privacy Shield
whois.contactPrivacyDescription1: Contact Privacy Protocol conceals the identity of a Registrant when a scan performs a WHOIS lookup on that Registrant's sector claim.
whois.contactPrivacyDescription2: The benefit of Contact Privacy Protocol is that the Registrant's identity, including station address, comm channel, and subspace comm address, is shielded from unauthorized scans, identity thieves, and hostile agents.
whois.contactPrivacyDescription3: When Registrants engage the Contact Privacy Protocol, masked contact information appears in the public WHOIS registry database.
whois.contactPrivacyAvailable: Contact Privacy Protocol is available for {cost} per sector claim per standard year.
whois.enableNow: To engage Contact Privacy Protocol for your Sector Claim, Place Requisition Now.
whois.confirmOrderMessage: Registry Privacy Shield credit cost: {cost} per standard year. Are you sure you want to place this requisition?
whois.enableMessage: Your sector claim {hostname} has a paid Registry Privacy Shield addon that is not yet engaged. Would you like to engage it now?
whois.whoisEnabled: Registry Privacy Shield is now engaged.
whois.disableTitle: Disengage and Decommission Registry Privacy Shield
whois.disableMessage: Your sector claim {hostname} Registry Privacy Shield addon is currently engaged. Are you sure you want to disengage and decommission it?
whois.whoisDisabled: Registry Privacy Shield has been disengaged and decommissioned.

whoisToggle.title: Registry Privacy Shield Addon
whoisToggle.addonEnabled: Your sector claim {domain} Registry Privacy Shield addon is Engaged
whoisToggle.addonDisabled: Your sector claim {domain} Registry Privacy Shield addon is Disengaged
whoisToggle.confirmEnable: Are you sure you want to Engage Registry Privacy?
whoisToggle.confirmDisable: Are you sure you want to Disengage and Decommission it?

lock.title: Sector Claim Lock / Unlock
lock.activateLock: Do you want to Engage the sector claim lock?
lock.inactivateLock: Do you want to Disengage the sector claim lock?

dnssec.title: DNSSEC Navigation Security Information
dnssec.enterDigest: Enter Value of Digest (Must not exceed {max} Characters)
dnssec.unableToParse: Unable to parse DS record format.
dnssec.confirmRemoveAll: This will purge all DNSSEC records for this sector claim.
dnssec.savingRecords: Committing DNSSEC records to ship's log...
dnssec.saveSuccess: DNSSEC records committed to ship's log successfully!
dnssec.noRecordsWarning: Please populate at least one DNSSEC record before proceeding.

renew.title: Renew Sector Claim
renew.tip1: Sector claims should be renewed on or before the decommission stardate.
renew.tip2: If a sector claim has decommissioned, there may be a grace period from the decommission stardate for renewal.
renew.tip3: Engage Registry Privacy Shield to conceal your Contact Coordinates when an officer performs a WHOIS scan on that Registrant's sector claim.
renew.alreadyRenewed: You have already renewed your sector claim!
renew.payExistingInvoice: To renew your sector claim, please transfer credits for the existing resource allocation notice.
renew.confirmRenewalMessage: Total credit cost: {cost}. Are you sure you want to place this renewal requisition?
renew.renewalOrderSuccess: Sector claim renewal requisition placed successfully!

transfer.title: Transfer Mission Status
transfer.notATransfer: This sector claim is not a transfer.
